title: STAR Architecture Decision - Enigma Model Routing
content:
Architecture Decision: Complexity-aware model routing for LLM workloads

Situation:
- Uniform use of premium models drove cost growth beyond sustainable levels.
- Some tasks did not need the highest-cost model tier to meet quality targets.

Task:
- Choose an inference architecture that optimizes cost while maintaining acceptable quality and latency.

Action:
- Designed complexity-aware model routing policy for request classes.
- Introduced caching to avoid redundant expensive inference calls.
- Allocated premium models to high-complexity tasks and lower-cost models to simpler tasks.
- Monitored quality drift and adjusted routing thresholds iteratively.

Result:
- Source material reports strong cost reduction with maintained quality expectations.
- Decision established a durable architecture pattern for cost-efficient GenAI scale.
